description: Creative Director self-review — LLM checks its own design before finalizing prompt
rule: Answer ALL 6 questions. If any answer is NO, redesign the layout before writing the final prompt_en.
questions: If this image appeared among 20 competing ads in a Meta Feed, would people STOP scrolling?
Is the product immediately understandable within 1 second?
Is there a single clear selling message — not multiple competing messages?
Is the visual hierarchy obvious: product first, then headline, then benefits, then CTA?
Does the image look like a premium marketplace advertisement rather than an AI-generated poster?
Would this design realistically increase CTR if placed as a sponsored product ad?
